name: panels
responsibility: React frontend for the panel window: card popup view, intent graph timeline, manual input dialog, settings page. Normal interactive WebView that appears on demand.

api_detail.mechanism: Listens to stash://show-card Tauri event from pet module
Listens to stash://show-input Tauri event from hotkey

api_detail.component: React component, 320px width, pixel-art style per card-popup.html mockup
React component, two-column timeline, Noto Serif, per intent-graph-final.html mockup. Virtual scrolling for >50 nodes.
React component, minimal text input + context selector + submit
React component, LLM mode toggle, Ollama URL, cloud API key, pet position, hotkey config

api_detail.mechanism: Calls focus_terminal (running/stuck) or open_pr_url (done) Tauri command based on status

nfr_constraints.performance: Card popup appear <200ms (REQ-013-AC-1). Card dismiss <150ms (REQ-013-AC-3). Graph render <500ms for 200 nodes (REQ-014-AC-5). Use react-window or similar for virtual scrolling.
nfr_constraints.other: Card popup: pixel-art style (Press Start 2P + IBM Plex Mono). Intent graph: editorial style (Noto Serif). Settings: general style (Space Grotesk). Style isolation via CSS modules or scoped classes.
